---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Research Projects"
page-layout: full
---

## Health & Epidemiology

::::::::::::::: project-grid
`<a class="quarto-grid-item" href="https://bernardkwabenaappiah.shinyapps.io/covid_app/"`{=html} <img src="files/images/covid.jpg" alt="Outbreak map"/>

::: card-title
<strong>COVID-19 US Interactive Dashboard</strong>
:::

::: card-description
An interactive Shiny dashboard visualizing COVID-19 cases, deaths, and vaccination rates across all 50 US states from 2020-2023 with spatial mapping.
:::

</a>

`<a class="quarto-grid-item" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1nqpqJttV87_weyMlGs0Q4zTefEtT7Wbw/view?usp=sharing"`{=html} <img src="files/images/supplement.jpg" alt="Supplement study"/>

::: card-title
<strong>Bayesian Beta-Carotene Supplementation Study</strong>
:::

::: card-description
Analyzed nutrient interactions using a Bayesian mixed model framework.
:::

</a>

`<a class="quarto-grid-item" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1OlhaFkVkz2vKrLJ4HZWwfqN6SzjPRr_D/view?usp=sharing"`{=html} <img src="files/images/SULF.jpg" alt="Dietry Sulfamerazine"/>

::: card-title
<strong>Dietary Sulfamerazine Study on Brown Trout </strong>
:::

::: card-description
Modeling dose–response effects of dietary sulfamerazine on red blood Cell Counts in brown trout.
:::

</a>

`<a class="quarto-grid-item" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1RFPNQ0ctz2Zea-7nzTEO_7yNASjlMVhE/view?usp=sharing"`{=html} <img src="files/images/lung.jpg" alt="Lung cancer"/>

::: card-title
<strong>Forecasting Lung Cancer Mortality</strong>
:::

::: card-description
Compared time series models (SES, HDES, ARIMA) for lung cancer prediction in the U.S.
:::

</a>

`<a class="quarto-grid-item" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1_5tP27bYKeGQEJuR_itGKWOfLCCzEqY9/view?usp=sharing"`{=html} <img src="files/images/PSA.jpg" alt=" PSA study"/>

::: card-title
<strong>Serum Prostate-Specific Antigen (PSA) Determinants in Prostate Study</strong>
:::

::: card-description
A regression-based clinical assessment on serum Prostate-Specific Antigen (PSA) determinants in prostate cancer.
:::

</a>

`<a class="quarto-grid-item" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1p_RnayMAGJ64QkwlI8FEcoazQWlKNQvS/view?usp=sharing"`{=html} <img src="files/images/malaria.jpg" alt="Malaria"/>

::: card-title
<strong>Malaria Trend Analysis in Comoros</strong>
:::

::: card-description
Modeling seasonal spikes in malaria using ARIMA modeling to inform timely response.
:::

</a>
:::::::::::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Education & Society

::::: project-grid
`<a class="quarto-grid-item" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Sltcu5K1yMvTsYX4dPPzI80OVlVwu0IG/view?usp=sharing"`{=html} <img src="files/images/teacher.jpg" alt="Student-teacher ratio"/>

::: card-title
<strong>Global Student-Teacher Ratio Modeling</strong>
:::

::: card-description
Mixed-effects framework to study education-level class size disparities worldwide.
:::

</a>
:::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Environmental Modeling

::::: project-grid
`<a class="quarto-grid-item" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/15vwHGg0QBm7NhgQBq60YrDvCSX6hhEgP/view?usp=sharing"`{=html} <img src="files/images/weather.jpg" alt="Ozone levels"/>

::: card-title
<strong>Ozone Concentration in Bernalillo, NM</strong>
:::

::: card-description
Regression analysis of meteorological and seasonal ozone drivers in New Mexico.
:::

</a>
:::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------
